mechanism_narrative: Declining federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and lower equity discount rates, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.02 over 3-year rolling windows or positive returns occur in less than 50 percent of declining rate periods.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer spending, which drives negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 60 percent of instances where unemployment rises above the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in real personal consumption expenditures and housing starts indicates broad-based domestic demand growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Joint positive growth in both series fails to yield positive 60-day returns in more than 55 percent of observed cases.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production index values reflect strengthening manufacturing output and capacity utilization, which generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days during early-cycle expansions.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in less than 45 percent of rising INDPRO observations within the specified regime.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating consumer price inflation triggers expectations of tighter monetary policy and margin compression, resulting in negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 delivers positive 20-day returns in more than 65 percent of months where CPI inflation exceeds the threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and declining unemployment rates confirms robust labor market tightening, which supports corporate earnings growth and yields positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal produces negative 60-day returns in more than 50 percent of historical occurrences.

mechanism_narrative: Quarter-over-quarter growth in real gross domestic product reflects expanding economic activity and corporate revenue potential, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.01 over rolling 5-year windows or positive returns materialize in less than 48 percent of positive GDP growth quarters.

mechanism_narrative: Consecutive monthly declines in the industrial production index signal contracting manufacturing activity and weakening economic momentum, which produces negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in more than 60 percent of instances following two consecutive monthly declines in industrial production.
